description_long: This apartment building is a modern, multi-story structure enclosed by a perimeter wall, featuring a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The facade is predominantly white with large rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. Several balconies are visible, offering outdoor space for residents, and the building is surrounded by a paved area and minimal landscaping with a few small trees. The main entrance is located on the front side, accessible from the street-facing side of the property. The building appears to have three main floors, with rooftop access and possible communal areas on the uppermost level. The overall design emphasizes functionality and simplicity, characteristic of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, white multi-story apartment building with flat roofs, balconies, and large rectangular windows, surrounded by a perimeter wall and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several balconies, and the paved area leading up to the building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the building, multiple windows, and a small landscaped area with trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simpler facade with fewer windows and a corner of the perimeter wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing garage doors, additional balconies, and the continuation of the perimeter wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern with consistent spacing and alignment across all visible facades, contributing to a symmetrical and orderly appearance.
